authorities.title: Limitation on business interest expense
authorities.body: Section 163(j) limits business interest deductions and is a recurring overlay in leveraged acquisitions, debt pushdown planning, and comparisons between structures that place financing in different entities.

authorities.title: Installment method relevance for contingent purchase price
authorities.body: Section 453 is relevant where contingent consideration, seller notes, or deferred purchase price may require installment-method analysis, affecting timing and characterization in transaction models.

authorities.title: Original issue discount and imputed interest rules for deferred consideration
authorities.body: Sections 1274 and 483 can recharacterize portions of deferred consideration as interest, making them important in earnout, seller-note, and financing-sensitive acquisition structures.
